# PHIL.061 ? Existentialism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** existentialism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Existence precedes essence; radical freedom; authenticity; anxiety and absurdity; individual responsibility; subjective truth

## Application
Recognize radical freedom; create own essence through choice; authentic existence; face anxiety; personal responsibility; subjective meaning

## Key Values
- Freedom
- Authenticity
- Responsibility
- Individual existence

philosophy, modern-western, existentialism
